hero.headline: The painters your *realtor recommends*
hero.subheadline: 90 five-star reviews say it all — we show up on time, communicate clearly, and make it right if it's not perfect the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Interior & Exterior Painting
services_section.subheading: From prep to cleanup, we handle every detail

services.title: Interior House Painting
services.description: Room by room or whole house — we prep walls properly, protect your furniture, and leave everything spotless when we're done.

services.title: Exterior House Painting
services.description: Weather-resistant finishes that stand up to Virginia Beach salt air and humidity. Full prep work and quality materials guaranteed.

services.title: Color Consultation
services.description: Not sure what colors work? We'll help you choose the perfect palette that complements your home and neighborhood.

services.title: Surface Preparation
services.description: Proper prep work is everything — we sand, prime, and repair surfaces so your paint job lasts for years, not months.

about.heading: Putting Good Apples Back in the Basket
about.body: Hughes Painting has built a reputation in Virginia Beach by doing what other painters often don't — showing up on time, communicating clearly, and fixing anything that isn't perfect. With 90+ five-star reviews and recommendations from local realtors, we've proven that professional painting service isn't just possible, it's our standard.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Virginia Beach Says About Us

reviews.name: Mike H.
reviews.text: Perfect five stars! Hughes has gone a long way toward putting good apples back in the basket. Great communication throughout the entire project.

reviews.name: Wesley S.
reviews.text: Used Hughes for two large jobs on our realtor's recommendation. Great skill and tenacious follow-up when one job needed a touch-up. Easy to have around the house.

reviews.name: Gerry H.
reviews.text: Outstanding job on our entire house. Professional and courteous staff the whole week. The quality and attention to detail was superb and impressive.

reviews.name: Robert M.
reviews.text: Excellent work at a very fair price. John stayed in touch about scheduling and his workers were on time and professional. Would definitely recommend!

cta.heading: Ready for a Paint Job Done Right?
cta.body: Join 90+ five-star customers who chose Hughes Painting. Free estimates, fair pricing, and the quality your home deserves.
